name: Morgan Stanley Dep Shs repstg 1/1000 Pfd Ser A
summary: Morgan Stanley Dep Shs repstg 1/1000 Pfd Ser A represents depositary shares, each representing a 1/1000th interest in a share of Morgan Stanley's preferred stock, Series A. The preferred stock pays dividends at a specific rate, as defined in the series A prospectus. This allows investors to purchase a fractional interest in preferred stock.
